case_title: COHEN, ALBERT A. vs. GONZALES, CARMEN MARIA AKA et al

docket_entries.description: #2,L/M-JUDGE QUIDACHAY,6/3/98: AFTER CONSIDERG THE PAPERS EVIDENCE & ARGUMENTS INCLUDING THE VIDEO TAPES,DECLARATN & EXHS. THE COURT FINDS DEFT IS: NOT BELIEVABLE,THAT SHE HAS ADMITTED LOCKING OUT PLFF,DEC- LARED PLFF WAS DECEASED & W/O PLFF'S CONSENT HAS IMPROPERLY TAKEN POSSESSION OF HIS HOME &DAMAGED & HARMED HIS HOME & PERSONAL PROPERTY, THAT SHE HAS W/HELD INFORMATN FROM CSL. DEFT'S MTN TO STAY EXECUTN OF THE WRIT OF EXECUTN FOR POSS. ISSUED PER CCP 1166A IS DENIED. PLFF'S CSL HAS AGREED TO MAKE DEFT'S PERSONAL PROPERTY... (SEE FILE FOR FURTHER TEXT)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COHEN, ALBERT A. AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, CARMEN MARIA AKA CARMELITA MARIA GONZALES DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

PROOF OF SERVICE OF EXPARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER SHORTENING TIME FOR SERVICE OF MOTION AND NOTICE OF MOTIONF OR ORDER OF IMMEDIATE POSSESSION AND ISSUANCE OF A WRIT OF POSSESSION, FILED BY PLTF'S ATTORNEY.

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 501, MOTION FOR ORDER OF IMMEDIATE POSSESSION AND ISSUANCE OF A WRIT, CALENDAR OF MAY-28-1998, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER NO OPPOSITION - MR. BRAVO APPEARED WITH NO EXPLANATION FOR NON APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT GONZALES. SEE EXECUTED ORDER.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT GONZALES, CARMELITA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

MOTION FOR ORDER OF IMMEDIATE POSSESSION AND ISSUANCE OF A WRIT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF COHEN, ALBERT A. HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 501

ORDER OF IMMEDIATE POSSESSION AND ISSUANCE OF A WRIT OF POSSESSION FOR RESTITUTION LOCATED AT 3601 MORAGA ST. AGAINST DEFT GONZALES, CARMEN MARIA AKA CARMELITA MARIA GONZALES AND ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, NAMED CLAIMANTS FILED
